$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete.

schemaDirectory.description: Directory where schema files are stored. Relative paths are resolved from the project root.

schemaRules.description: Rules that decide which JSON Schema applies to which Markdown files.

name.description: Unique rule name used by md-utils schema validate <rule-name>.

schema.description: Schema file path, resolved relative to schemaDirectory.

frontmatterRequired.description: When true, files matched by this rule are invalid if they have no frontmatter.

paths.description: Glob patterns matched against project-relative Markdown file paths.

excludePaths.description: Glob patterns excluded after paths match.

frontmatter.description: Frontmatter field matchers. Each key is a frontmatter key.

includes.description: Matches when the frontmatter value is an array containing this JSON value.
